chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1770 of 2023 (Mst. Rozina versus Province of Sindh and others) Present: Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro, J. Date of hearing: 05.03.2024 Date of decision: 05.03.2024 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – Petitioner, claiming to be a Lady Health Worker appointed on contract basis in District Khairpur, has filed this petition seeking regularization of her service on the ground that the lady health workers, who were appointed with her, have already been regularized by the Health Department. 2. Respondents No.2 and 5 have filed the comments stating that petitioner performed her duty as a Lady Health Worker till the year 2014 against fixed salary duly received by her through bank account. Thereafter, she went absent without any information and intimation to her superiors; hence, her salary was stopped and she was terminated. Since 2014, she has not performed her duty. The other lady health workers were performing their duties and their services were regularized on the orders of this Court and the Supreme Court, after the scrutiny committee was constituted for this purpose, where they had all appeared and passed the physical verification. Petitioner neither had appeared, nor has performed her duty since the year 2014. 3. We have heard petitioner in person. She has not forwarded any explanation for her long absence since the year 2014 from her duty or her failure to appear before the scrutiny committee for physical verification subsequently. No case, therefore, for any indulgence is made out, and accordingly, this petition is dismissed.

She has not forwarded any explanation for her long absence since the year 2014 from her duty or her failure to appear before the scrutiny committee for physical verification subsequently. No case, therefore, for any indulgence is made out, and accordingly, this petition is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
